content: We can borrow the formative assessment design of high school English reflective writing workshops to frame multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where the LLM acts as both the student generating a solution draft and the teacher grading it against inconsistent alternative perspectives, just as students learn to revise their own writing through structured reflection exercises. This framework turns abstract LLM self-reflection into a scaffolded, repeatable process that mirrors how humans build reflective skill through deliberate practice.
